heading: Good Samaritan Search and Recovery Act
label: 1742a Good Samaritan Search and Recovery Act
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the John D. Dingell, Jr. Conservation, Management, and Recreation Act, and not as part of the Federal Land Policy and Management Act of 1976 which comprises this chapter.
Definition of “Secretary”Secretary means the Secretary of the Interior, see , set out as a note under , Conservation.section 2 of Pub. L. 116–9section 1 of Title 16

children.label: A
children.text: acting in a not-for-profit capacity; and

children.label: B
children.text: composed entirely of members who, at the time of the good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission, have attained the age of majority under the law of the State where the mission takes place.

children.heading: Good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission
children.label: 2 Good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission
children.text: The term “good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission” means a search conducted by an eligible organization or individual for 1 or more missing individuals believed to be deceased at the time that the search is initiated.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary or the Secretary of Agriculture, as applicable.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Each Secretary shall develop and implement a process to expedite access to Federal land under the administrative jurisdiction of the Secretary for eligible organizations and individuals to request access to Federal land to conduct good Samaritan search-and-recovery missions.

children.label: i
children.text: shall be acting for private purposes; and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall not be considered to be a Federal volunteer;

children.label: B
children.text: an eligible organization or individual conducting a good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission under this section shall not be considered to be a volunteer under ;section 102301(c) of title 54

children.label: C
children.text: chapter 171 of title 28 (commonly known as the “Federal Tort Claims Act”) shall not apply to an eligible organization or individual carrying out a privately requested good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission under this section; and

children.label: D
children.text: chapter 81 of title 5 (commonly known as the “Federal Employees Compensation Act”) shall not apply to an eligible organization or individual conducting a good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission under this section, and the conduct of the good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission shall not constitute civilian employment.

children.heading: Release of Federal Government from liability
children.label: c Release of Federal Government from liability

children.text: acknowledges and consents, in writing, to the provisions described in subparagraphs (A) through (D) of subsection (b)(2); and

signs a waiver releasing the Federal Government from all liability relating to the access granted under this section and agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the United States from any claims or lawsuits arising from any conduct by the eligible organization or individual on Federal land.

children.heading: Approval and denial of requests
children.label: d Approval and denial of requests

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall notify an eligible organization or individual of the approval or denial of a request by the eligible organization or individual to carry out a good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission under this section by not later than 48 hours after the request is made.

children.label: A
children.text: the reason for the denial of the request; and

children.label: B
children.text: any actions that the eligible organization or individual can take to meet the requirements for the request to be approved.
to coordinate good Samaritan search-and-recovery missions on Federal land under the administrative jurisdiction of the Secretary; and
to expedite and accelerate good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission efforts for missing individuals on Federal land under the administrative jurisdiction of the Secretary.
plans to develop partnerships described in subsection (e)(1); and

efforts carried out to expedite and accelerate good Samaritan search-and-recovery mission efforts for missing individuals on Federal land under the administrative jurisdiction of each Secretary pursuant to subsection (e)(2).
